channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists stunned as bumble bees solve a classic intelligence test
item.description: Bumble bees surprised researchers by inventing a new way to reach a hidden reward, despite never being taught the trick.

item.title: Old muscle stem cells can act young again but there's a catch
item.description: UCLA scientists discovered that a protein called NDRG1 builds up in older muscle stem cells, slowing healing, but removal can restore youth.

item.title: A peculiar LIGO signal may reveal the missing link to dark matter
item.description: An unusual gravitational wave signal has revived hopes that primordial black holes, once purely theoretical, may now be detectable.

item.title: Scientists achieve quantum time reversal in a stunning physics breakthrough
item.description: Researchers have developed quantum control techniques that make a system appear to run backward in time through precise measurement management.
